subcodes.first_line: This is the perspicuous Book sent down in truth from the dominion of God, the Most High, the Most Great, summoning all peoples unto the Beloved [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب مبین نزل بالحق من جبروت الله العلی العظیم و یدع الناس الی محبوب
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @He Whom God Shall Make Manifest; the Bab and Baha'u'llah, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @chastisement and requital
